lessons: CORRECTED an error from v1.3.0 (caught when re-checking tool accuracy): self-employed reservists do NOT get 25% INSTEAD of the 40% tosefet, they get the tagmul (incl. 40%) PLUS an additional 25% (verified btl.gov.il: לעובד עצמאי משולם בנוסף לתגמול גם פיצוי בשיעור 25%). Fixed SKILL+HE+gotcha. miluim-daily-pay tool got an employee/self-employed field (was computing employee-only, so self-employed got a wrong, too-low number).

THE 40% SUPPLEMENT IS A REMAINDER RULE, not a flat uplift. BTL divides the service days by 7 and pays the supplement only on the remainder (0 -> nothing, 6 -> +1 full day). 7/14/21 days therefore earn NO supplement at all. The skill (and the live /tools calculator) multiplied every day by 1.4, overstating a 21-day call-up by 40% (11,760 instead of 8,400). The skill's OWN reference file carried the correct worked example (400/day x 21 = 8,400) while the Gotchas section branded that same arithmetic as a ~40% under-estimate. An internal contradiction between a reference file and the body is a free bug detector.

BTL's own examples table has one row (120 -> 122) that contradicts the rule stated three lines above it (120 mod 7 = 1 -> 120.4). The stated rule reproduces 19 of their 20 rows, so the rule was encoded and the outlier row treated as a typo, and that decision is documented in the checker's sources. When a source disagrees with itself, follow the normative rule text, not a single table cell, and say so.

WRONG PAYING AGENCY: Tagmul Nosaf and Tagmul Meyuchad are IDF payments (automatic, by 1 May, to the account registered with the unit; chased at 1111 ext. 4), not Bituach Leumi ones. The skill routed users to the BTL portal and *6050 -- the exact 'wrong agency' failure the skill itself warns about elsewhere.

Tagmul Meyuchad starts at 32 cumulative shamap days, not 60 (the skill said 60 in six places), and its daily rate is BANDED by unit activity tier (133/113/86/60/40/30), not a flat 133.33. Same banded-amount-quoted-flat disease as the bituach-leumi skill.

FORM 510 IS THE EMPLOYER'S WAGE CONFIRMATION. The reservist's personal claim is 502. The skill's 'employer refuses to pay -> file 510' fallback sent the reservist to a form only that employer can complete. Verified against the BTL reserve-duty forms index: 501 employer claim, 502 personal claim, 509 advance, 510 employer wage confirmation.

The self-employed cap was breached in two different directions at once: the prose clamped before the +40% and the checker clamped after it and then added 25%. BTL: 'סכום התגמול והפיצוי יחד, לא יעלה על התגמול המקסימלי'.

CARRY: the IDF Aka / Keren HaSiyua grant table in references/2026-law-changes.md still does not match the 2026 תקנון (the student tutoring grant is a 3-tier banded amount with a 21-day minimum, and several named grants in the skill do not appear in the regulations under those names). Not fixed this cycle.
CARRY: Amendment 283 credits are granted in the tax year FOLLOWING the service year; SKILL.md still implies same-year credit in Example 4.
